data.body: AC amendment (GAP-002): Add a 4th test function test_pipeline_part_c_trigger_outside_directory that greps for 'outside' (or equivalent phrase) in the pipeline file to verify the trigger scope constraint ('outside its directory') is specified in the Part C section. Verify: grep -q 'test_pipeline_part_c_trigger_outside_directory' tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
